title: Dashboard
addDashboardDescription: Enter a name for the new dashboard
deleteDashboardConfirmDesc: This will permanently remove "{{name}}" and all its widgets.
emptyDashboard: This dashboard has no widgets yet.

catalog.description: Browse and add widgets to your dashboard

desc.market-value: Current market value of the selected data series at the end of the reporting period.
desc.ttwror: Cumulative true time-weighted return of the selected data series for the reporting period.
desc.ttwror-pa: Annualized true time-weighted return, useful for comparing performance across different time horizons.
desc.irr: Internal rate of return (money-weighted) that accounts for the timing and size of all cash flows.
desc.delta: Difference between the final and initial market value, adjusted for cash flows during the period.
desc.absolute-performance: Total profit or loss in absolute terms for the selected data series over the reporting period.
desc.absolute-change: Net change in portfolio value including all deposits, withdrawals and market movements.
desc.calculation-compact: Compact summary showing key performance metrics for the selected data series at a glance.
desc.perf-chart: Time series chart showing market value and TTWROR evolution for the reporting period.
desc.max-drawdown: Largest peak-to-trough decline in cumulative performance during the reporting period.
desc.max-drawdown-duration: Longest time between two consecutive performance peaks during the reporting period.
desc.current-drawdown: Current decline from the most recent peak in cumulative performance.
desc.drawdown-chart: Time series chart showing the drawdown from peak performance over the reporting period.
desc.volatility: Standard deviation of log-returns annualized over trading days in the reporting period.
desc.semivariance: Downside deviation considering only returns below the mean, annualized over trading days.
desc.sharpe-ratio: Risk-adjusted return: excess return over risk-free rate divided by volatility.
desc.returns-heatmap: Monthly and yearly returns displayed as a color-coded heat map.
desc.benchmark-comparison: Compare portfolio return against a benchmark with alpha calculation.
desc.movers: Best and worst performing securities ranked by TTWROR with mini sparkline charts.
desc.cost-tax-drag: Impact of fees and taxes on your gross returns, shown as percentage of gains consumed and annualized expense ratio.
desc.cash-drag: Proportion of your portfolio held as idle cash, indicating potential cash drag on performance.
desc.all-time-high: Highest total portfolio value ever recorded, with the date it occurred.
desc.distance-from-ath: How far the current portfolio value is below its all-time high, as a percentage.
desc.invested-capital: Total purchase value of all holdings for the active reporting period.
desc.watchlist: Compact price monitor for a selected watchlist

widget.selectBenchmarkDescription: Search and select a benchmark security

movers.noSecurities: No securities held in this period

costTaxDrag.shortPeriodWarning: Short period — annualized ratios may be misleading

dataSeries.description: Configure the data series for this widget

periodOverride.title: Widget Period
periodOverride.description: Override the reporting period for this widget
